holdings.infoBox: DBJP is an equity ETF with a total of 178 individual holdings. The top holdings are Currency Contract - Usd stock at 95.40%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 3.98%, Tokyo Electron at 3.66%, Kioxia Holdings at 3.43%, and Toyota Motor at 3.11%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers MSCI Japan Hedged Equity ETF (DBJP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of Japanese stocks. The fund is hedged against Japanese yen (JPY) currency fluctuations. DBJP was launched on Jun 9, 2011 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: MSCI Japan 100% Hedged to USD Net Variant

data.title: Yen Strengthens Amid FX Intervention Risks
data.text: The yen strengthened against other G-10 and Asian currencies amid risks of potential FX intervention by Japanese authorities.

data.title: Japan's Consumer Inflation Held Steady in May
